validation.backend_pytest: PYTHONPATH=backend python3 -m pytest -q backend/tests/test_api_backend.py backend/tests/test_artifact_manager.py backend/tests/test_docker_config.py
validation.frontend_test_build: cd frontend && npm run test:run && npm run build
validation.curl_health: backend process starts locally; direct curl from separate sandbox command could not connect in this environment
